description: Returns list of payment subtier waivers

parameters.name: subtier_requisition_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the subtier requisition, supports comma separated list

parameters.name: waiver_type
parameters.description: Waiver type of the subtier waiver. Can only be either "unconditional" or "conditional"

id.description: Primary ID for the subtier waiver

waiver_type.description: Waiver type of the subtier waiver. Can only be either "unconditional" or "conditional"

created_by.description: Name of the user who created the waiver

updated_by.description: Name of the user who updated the waiver

uploaded_by.description: Name of the user who uploaded the waiver

reviewed_by.description: Name of the user who reviewed the waiver

status.description: Status of the waiver. Can be not_submitted/revise_and_resubmit/review_pending/approved.
